issuers.description: Simulated Bundesdruckerei issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues PID, mDL and Age Verification credentials.
Simulated RDW (Dutch Vehicle Registration Authority) issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues Vehicle Registration Certificate (mVRC).
Simulated telecom organisation issuer hosted on the Animo EUDI Playground. Issues MSISDN credentials.

This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Tax Administration (Belastingdienst), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.

credentialConfigurations.displayName: Statement of payment behaviour compliance with tax obligations

issuers.description: This is a demo credential issuer for the fictitious "Tulip Bank", hosted by Credenco. It provides credentials that can be used across pilots, experiments, and demos.
This is the EUDI reference credential issuer that can be used for testing, demonstration, and pilot applications, providing a set of credentials aligned with the EUDI reference architecture.
This is the reference credential issuer from the EWC project, hosted by the University of the Aegean. It issues a range of credentials used for various use cases in the EWC EUDI Large Scale Pilot

The FIDES community credential issuer provides sandbox credentials for testing interoperability within the FIDES Community Platform. It issues a range of verifiable credentials for use in pilot projects.
A sandbox issuer simulating MijnOverheid credential issuance for testing purposes within the FIDES Community Platform.
EUDI Wallet playground issuer by Hovi. Issues a broad range of EUDI credential types including PID, EHIC, Diploma, IBAN, Photo ID and more.

This sandbox credential issuer from the Dutch Chamber of Commerce (Kamer van Koophandel), hosted by Credenco, supports a range of credentials used in pilots, experiments, and demonstrations to explore interoperable digital trust.

This sandbox credential issuer from MOSIP Inji Certify supports the issuance of insurance-related credentials in the MOSIP collab environment for testing OpenID4VCI flows and interoperability scenarios.
This sandbox credential issuer from MultiPaz supports the issuance of verious credentials for testing OpenID4VCI flows and interoperability scenarios.
Test issuer on the Namirial Wallet Studio platform. Issues PID, mDL, Age Verification and contact credentials.
